title: PlayerLadderC
description: Allows you to sit on a players head using a command. Fork of PlayerLadder
body:
# PlayerLadderC
This mod allows you to sit on others players heads using the command `/playersit <player>` \
The difference in this fork is that it uses a command, instead of right-clicking the player thus making it a lot nicer to use, at least in my opinion

You **cannot** do this on yourself  \
You **cannot** do this on multiple players at once (e.g. one person cannot be sitting on 2 people's heads at the same time)  \
You **do not** need operator permissions for this command \
You **must** be within 5 blocks of the player you wish to sit on

And no, there is currently no way to kick a player off
